title: NASA’s Artemis II Mission Leaves Earth Orbit for Flight around Moon
summary: For the first time in more than 50 years, astronauts on a NASA mission are bound to fly around the Moon after successfully completing a key burn of Orion’s main engine. title: Artemis 2 crew blasts off on historic moon mission
summary: A three-man one-woman crew blasted off on a voyage to the moon Wednesday, riding atop the world's most powerful operational rocket as it roared away on a trail-blazing flight to help pave the way for upcoming lunar landings and an American moon base.
